revision.comment: Added the page to [[:Category:Module documentation pages]]
revision.text:
{{module rating|protected}} {{High-use|325916}} {{Lua|Module:Color contrast/colors}} This module is used primarily by * {{tl|Color contrast ratio}} * {{tl|RGBColorToLum}} * {{tl|Color contrast conformance}} * {{tl|Ensure AAA contrast ratio}} * {{tl|Ensure AA contrast ratio}} * {{tl|Greater color contrast ratio}} It is also used for tracking within * [[Module:Navbox]] * [[Module:Userbox]] * [[Module:Episode list]] and for documentation in * [[Module:College color]] The formulas used are [https://www.w3.org/WAI/GL/wiki/Relative_luminance#Definition_as_Stated_in_WCAG_2.x stated in WCAG 2.x specifications]. [[WCAG]] is the main guideline for creating accessible interfaces on the web. == Usage == To use this module, you may use one of the above listed templates or invoke the module directly * To compute relative luminescence:
{{ColorToLum|color}} or {{#invoke:Color contrast|lum|color}} * To compute a contrast ratio between two colors:
{{Color contrast ratio|color1|color2|error=?}} or {{#invoke:Color contrast|ratio|color1|color2|error=?}} * To determine which of two colors (color2a and color2b) has the greater contrast ratio with a particular color (color1):
{{Greater color contrast ratio|color1|color2a|color2b}} or {{#invoke:Color contrast|greatercontrast|color1|color2a|color2b}} * To compute the contrast ratio between the background and text colors specified in a css style string:
{{#invoke:Color contrast|styleratio|css style statement string|default background color|default text color}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Modules handling colors]] }} [[Category:Module documentation pages]]

{{module rating|protected}} {{High-use|325916}} {{Lua|Module:Color contrast/colors}} This module is used primarily by * {{tl|Color contrast ratio}} * {{tl|RGBColorToLum}} * {{tl|Color contrast conformance}} * {{tl|Ensure AAA contrast ratio}} * {{tl|Ensure AA contrast ratio}} * {{tl|Greater color contrast ratio}} It is also used for tracking within * [[Module:Navbox]] * [[Module:Userbox]] * [[Module:Episode list]] and for documentation in * [[Module:College color]] The formulas used are [https://www.w3.org/WAI/GL/wiki/Relative_luminance#Definition_as_Stated_in_WCAG_2.x stated in WCAG 2.x specifications]. [[WCAG]] is the main guideline for creating accessible interfaces on the web. == Usage == To use this module, you may use one of the above listed templates or invoke the module directly * To compute relative luminescence:
{{ColorToLum|color}} or {{#invoke:Color contrast|lum|color}} * To compute a contrast ratio between two colors:
{{Color contrast ratio|color1|color2|error=?}} or {{#invoke:Color contrast|ratio|color1|color2|error=?}} * To determine which of two colors (color2a and color2b) has the greater contrast ratio with a particular color (color1):
{{Greater color contrast ratio|color1|color2a|color2b}} or {{#invoke:Color contrast|greatercontrast|color1|color2a|color2b}} * To compute the contrast ratio between the background and text colors specified in a css style string:
{{#invoke:Color contrast|styleratio|css style statement string|default background color|default text color}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Modules handling colors]] }} [[Category:Module documentation pages]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{module rating|protected}} {{High-use|325916}} {{Lua|Module:Color contrast/colors}} This module is used primarily by * {{tl|Color contrast ratio}} * {{tl|RGBColorToLum}} * {{tl|Color contrast conformance}} * {{tl|Ensure AAA contrast ratio}} * {{tl|Ensure AA contrast ratio}} * {{tl|Greater color contrast ratio}} It is also used for tracking within * [[Module:Navbox]] * [[Module:Userbox]] * [[Module:Episode list]] and for documentation in * [[Module:College color]] The formulas used are [https://www.w3.org/WAI/GL/wiki/Relative_luminance#Definition_as_Stated_in_WCAG_2.x stated in WCAG 2.x specifications]. [[:en:WCAG|WCAG]] is the main guideline for creating accessible interfaces on the web. == Usage == To use this module, you may use one of the above listed templates or invoke the module directly * To compute relative luminescence:
{{ColorToLum|color}} or {{#invoke:Color contrast|lum|color}} * To compute a contrast ratio between two colors:
{{Color contrast ratio|color1|color2|error=?}} or {{#invoke:Color contrast|ratio|color1|color2|error=?}} * To determine which of two colors (color2a and color2b) has the greater contrast ratio with a particular color (color1):
{{Greater color contrast ratio|color1|color2a|color2b}} or {{#invoke:Color contrast|greatercontrast|color1|color2a|color2b}} * To compute the contrast ratio between the background and text colors specified in a css style string:
{{#invoke:Color contrast|styleratio|css style statement string|default background color|default text color}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Modules handling colors]] }} [[Category:Module documentation pages]]
